docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REED, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOYCE, ROBERT $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY REED, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT JOYCE, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$20.00) SERVED MAY-16-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOYCE, ROBERT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY REED, MICHAEL JOYCE, ROBERT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JOYCE, ROBERT
